changes:
• Show MM/DD/YYYY hint in empty due date field
• Allow manual date entry while keeping picker min limits
• Use native date picker behavior with cross-platform min-date guard
• Improve date picker behavior and search clear action
• Fix DayCol action arrow alignment and repair label
• Fix iOS standalone add-case card top offset
• Harden username persistence for shared Chrome profiles
• Use deep refresh flow for remote updates and restarts
• Tune board row animation weights to shared spring
• Refine board row expansion animations
• fix(flash): set --pulse-clock once at startup, remove RAF loop
• fix(flash): restore @keyframes system driven by FlashContext --pulse-clock
• fix(glow): replace filter:brightness with GPU-composited box-shadow on .glow
• fix(perf): stop FlashContext broadcasting 60fps React re-renders to entire app
• fix(pulse): eliminate jitter in overdue tab and status dot animations
• perf(App): remove lazy loading from Editor, SettingsModal, SystemManagementScreen
• fix(header+bubble): sticky tab bar and working bubble-transform animation
• Fix stale app icon caching and improve PWA icon coverage
• Delete public/icons/IMG_7014.png
• ESLint cleanup: remove unused variables across remaining files
• ESLint cleanup: remove unused variables and dead assignments
• Remove unused imports from QAEngine.js
• 120Hz animation fixes and ESLint cleanup (partial)
• Audit fixes, perf improvements, and migrate framer-motion to motion
• Fix delete confirm modal clipped off-screen on mobile
• Parse note time client-side only, no DB writes
• Parse time from case notes to set due time on save
• fix(icons): regenerate all icons from new square JPEG source
• Add files via upload
• fix(icons): fill transparent background with solid dark navy (#02355B)
• feat(icons): replace all app icons with new Stomaboard logo
• Add files via upload
• fix(lite-mode): fix white-on-white text when bg-white/* made opaque
• fix(pwa): fix iOS home-screen safe-area layout issues
• WebKit/Safari optimizations: viewport, font, animation GPU hints
• fix(css): resolve shadow flicker on Apple devices in white/pink themes
• feat(auth): gate entire app behind login — prevent DevTools bypass
• docs: add CLAUDE.md with comprehensive codebase guide for AI assistants
• fix(lite-mode): remove animation/rAF throttle – target GPU compositor only
• feat(lite-mode): complete rewrite of LiteModePerformancePatch + expose in Settings
• feat(perf+pwa): Tailwind build pipeline, PWA install, service worker, lazy loading, Vercel caching
• feat(auth): enforce name validation in login modal + persistent device-based login
• security: remove all hardcoded credentials, read from env vars only
• fix(build): set CI=false in build script to prevent warnings-as-errors on Vercel
• fix(lint): resolve all ESLint errors that blocked Vercel production build
• fix(build): remove unused typescript devDep + add .npmrc to fix Vercel ERESOLVE
• fix(deps): upgrade framer-motion to 12.34.3 and add overrides to prevent duplicate motion packages on Vercel
• Initial commit
